name: memprocfs

metadata.name: memprocfs
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Affero General Public License v3
metadata.license: GNU Affero General Public License v3

documentation: MemProcFS for Python : native extension for windows memory analysis and forensics

modules.name: memprocfs.memprocfs
documentation: Fast and convenient python access towards the native vmm.dll and in some

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.FLAG_NOCACHE
documentation: do not use the data cache (force reading from memory acquisition device)

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.FLAG_ZEROPAD_ON_FAIL
documentation: zero pad failed physical memory reads and report success if read within range of physical memory.

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.FLAG_FORCECACHE_READ
documentation: force use of cache - fail non-cached pages - only valid for reads, invalid with VMM_FLAG_NOCACHE/VMM_FLAG_ZEROPAD_ON_FAIL.

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.FLAG_NOPAGING
documentation: do not try to retrieve memory from paged out memory from pagefile/compressed (even if possible)

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.FLAG_NOPAGING_IO
documentation: do not try to retrieve memory from paged out memory if read would incur additional I/O (even if possible).

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.FLAG_NOCACHEPUT
documentation: do not write back to the data cache upon successful read from memory acquisition device.

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.FLAG_CACHE_RECENT_ONLY
documentation: only fetch from the most recent active cache region when reading.

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.FLAG_NO_PREDICTIVE_READ
documentation: do not perform additional predictive page reads (default on smaller requests).

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.FLAG_FORCECACHE_READ_DISABLE
documentation: disable/override any use of VMM_FLAG_FORCECACHE_READ. only recommended for local files. improves forensic artifact order.

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.PLUGIN_NOTIFY_REFRESH_FAST
documentation: refresh fast event   - at partial process refresh.

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.PLUGIN_NOTIFY_REFRESH_MEDIUM
documentation: refresh medium event - at full process refresh.

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.PLUGIN_NOTIFY_REFRESH_SLOW
documentation: refresh slow event   - at registry refresh.

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.OPT_CORE_LEECHCORE_HANDLE
documentation: R - underlying leechcore handle (do not close).

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.OPT_CONFIG_TICK_PERIOD
documentation: RW - base tick period in ms

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.OPT_CONFIG_READCACHE_TICKS
documentation: RW - memory cache validity period (in ticks)

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.OPT_CONFIG_TLBCACHE_TICKS
documentation: RW - page table (tlb) cache validity period (in ticks)

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.OPT_CONFIG_STATISTICS_FUNCTIONCALL
documentation: RW - enable function call statistics (.status/statistics_fncall file)

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.OPT_REFRESH_FREQ_FAST
documentation: W - refresh fast frequency - incl. partial process refresh

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.OPT_REFRESH_FREQ_MEDIUM
documentation: W - refresh medium frequency - incl. full process refresh

variables.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.VMMDLL_OPT_PROCESS_DTB
documentation: W - force set process directory table base.

classes.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.RegUtil

methods.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.RegUtil.ft2str
documentation:
Convert a Windows FileTime integer to string.

Keyword arguments:
-- ft_int = int: Windows FileTime value.
-- return = str: 23 char time in format: '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC' / '2020-01-01 23:59:59 UTC'.

methods.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.RegUtil.print_keyvalue
documentation:
Print a key-value pair on the screen with formatting.

Keyword arguments:
-- indent_int = int: indent in # spaces.
-- key_str = str: key name.
-- value_str = str: optional value string; default: ''.
-- line_length = int: optional line length; default: 80.
-- is_line_truncate = bool: optional truncate flag; default False.
-- is_value_bracked = bool: optional put value str inside []; default False.

methods.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.RegUtil.print_filetime
documentation:
Print a keyname/filetime pair on the screen with formatting.

Keyword arguments:
-- indent_int = int: indent in # spaces.
-- key_str = str: key name.
-- ft_int = int: time in Windows FILETIME format.
-- line_length = int: optional line length; default: 80.
-- is_line_truncate = bool: optional truncate flag; default False.
-- is_value_bracked = bool: optional put value str inside []; default False.

methods.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.RegUtil.read_utf16
documentation:
Read a UTF-16 value from registry with exceptions suppressed.
UTF-16 values are default for registry keys.

Keyword arguments:
-- vmm = Vmm: MemProcFS VMM object.
-- reg_value_path = str: value path/name __OR__ bytes: raw value.
-- is_skip_typecheck = bool: skip typecheck (REG_SZ, REG_EXPAND_SZ); default False.
-- return = str: value on success, '' on fail.

methods.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.RegUtil.read_ascii
documentation:
Read an ascii value from registry with exceptions suppressed.

Keyword arguments:
-- vmm = Vmm: MemProcFS VMM object.
-- reg_value_path = str: value path/name __OR__ bytes: raw value.
-- return = str: value on success, '' on fail.

methods.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.RegUtil.read_qword
documentation:
Read a 64-bit 'QWORD' value from registry with exceptions suppressed.

Keyword arguments:
-- vmm = Vmm: MemProcFS VMM object.
-- reg_value_path = str: value path/name __OR__ bytes: raw value.
-- is_skip_typecheck = bool: skip typecheck; default False.
-- return = int: value on success, -1 on fail.

methods.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.RegUtil.read_dword
documentation:
Read a 32-bit 'DWORD' value from registry with exceptions suppressed.

Keyword arguments:
-- vmm = Vmm: MemProcFS VMM object.
-- reg_value_path = str: value path/name __OR__ bytes: raw value.
-- is_skip_typecheck = bool: skip typecheck; default False.
-- return = int: value on success, -1 on fail.

methods.name: memprocfs.memprocfs.RegUtil.mrulistex_expand
documentation:
Convert a MRUListEx reg value into a list.

Keyword arguments:
-- mrulistex_bytes = bytes: value of MRUListEx data.
-- return = array: int of value MRUListEx values.
RegUtil 'container' for helper functions related to registry.
